operationalSituations.description: Normal vehicle operation — all zone controllers reachable
Partial network fault — one or more zone controllers unreachable
Safety-critical manoeuvre — emergency braking or collision avoidance active

hazards.description: Loss of command delivery to safety-critical zone (e.g. braking actuator)
Spurious command sent to wrong zone controller
Zone controller watchdog not kicked, leading to unintended reset

safetyGoals.description: The RCP library shall detect and report command delivery failures within the timeout period.
The RCP library shall validate that commands are addressed to the correct zone and reject mismatched deliveries.
The RCP library shall provide a CmdWatchdog command type and ensure it is delivered with at least PriorityHigh.
